content.text:
All tests pass (13 passing including the new cursed sword test, 31 todo).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added a `calculateItemBase` helper that applies a 50% surcharge to the item's base premium when `item.cursed === true`. Updated `calculateGroupBase` to sum per-item bases (preserving the component-block special case).
- Result: All tests pass (13 passing, 31 todo).
- Approach: Minimal change to introduce per-item modifier handling. Just enough to make the cursed sword test pass without breaking the existing component-block logic or single-item logic.
